level_signals: 3–5+ years in RFP/proposal management, sales operations, or solution engineering
Colorado salary range $126,000–$170,000 consistent with Senior IC
Owns end-to-end RFP lifecycle with cross-functional coordination across senior stakeholders

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–5+ years in RFP/proposal management, sales operations, or solution engineering
Strong project management and organizational skills
Excellent written communication skills and attention to detail
Ability to operate cross-functionally in fast-paced, high-growth environments

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Familiarity with SaaS business models strongly preferred
Experience with proposal tools (e.g., Loopio, RFPIO, Arphie) a plus
Ownership mindset with strong attention to quality and deadlines
Structured thinker who can manage complex, multi-stakeholder workflows
Comfortable driving alignment across technical and business teams
Balances speed with accuracy and compliance

explicitly_excluded: Visa sponsorship: 'this position is not eligible for visa sponsorship'

scope.surface: End-to-end RFP/RFI/RFQ and due diligence questionnaire lifecycle; enterprise proposal development
primary_metrics_inferred: Proposal content library completeness and maintenance
core_responsibilities: Lead and project-manage the full RFP lifecycle from intake through submission
Assess requirements and build structured response plans, timelines, and ownership
Coordinate cross-functional inputs (Sales, Legal, Security, Product, Engineering, Finance)
Draft, edit, and refine responses for clarity, accuracy, and consistency
Ensure alignment with product positioning, commercial terms, and company standards
Own, maintain and evolve the RFP knowledge base / content library
Track deadlines, risks, approvals, and deliverables to ensure on-time submission
Ensure compliance with technical, security, pricing, and contractual requirements
Support post-submission activities (clarifications, best and final offers, follow-ups)
Drive continuous improvement through metrics, reporting, and process enhancement

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($126,000–$170,000 for Colorado; actual range likely comparable or higher in other markets)
Well-defined role scope with clear ownership of end-to-end RFP lifecycle
Application deadline stated (06/02/2026), signaling active and time-bound hiring process
Stock options offered to all full-time employees
Comprehensive benefits package including 100% employee health premium coverage
red_flags: No visa sponsorship available; applicants must already be authorized to work
Salary range is only stated for Colorado; other states' ranges are not disclosed
Role must be conducted in a state where Contentful is registered to do business — could limit some distributed candidates
No mention of specific team size or reporting structure

fields_inferred_not_stated: location.type inferred as remote-us: JD says 'must be conducted in a state in which we are currently registered' and lists no required office location or hybrid policy; new hire equipment stipend for 'hybrid or distributed employees' suggests distributed/remote is standard
seniority.level inferred from years range and compensation
scope.primary_metrics_inferred inferred from 'What success looks like' section and responsibilities
compensation.location_pay_differential inferred from Colorado-specific salary statement
ambiguities: Compensation range ($126,000–$170,000) is stated explicitly only for Colorado. The JD does not disclose ranges for other states, so base_range_usd reflects only the Colorado figure.

Location type is not explicitly labelled hybrid or remote. Body text references 'hybrid or distributed employees' for equipment stipend, and requires work in a registered state, but no office attendance requirement is stated. Treated as remote-us.
The 'Ideal profile' and 'What success looks like' bullets are framed as ideal attributes rather than hard requirements; classified as nice_to_haves accordingly.
